node.text:
We wish we had this earlier

Learning as a builder is mostly…
figuring things out the hard way.

But tools like Claude change that.

If you ask the right questions,
you can compress days of confusion into minutes.

These 6 prompts are simple,
but they’ll make you learn faster than most

For daily founder tips
Follow @101xfounders
Im not using AI dude , I prefer water
